name: Verify Admin can change Admin role to Manager
description:
Invite member with Admin role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can change user role from Admin to Manager
    - User after changing role from Admin to Manager:
        - Can access organization Settings
        - Can access organization Billing
descriptionHtml:
Invite member with Admin role.
Verify that:
- Admin can change user role from Admin to Manager
- User after changing role from Admin to Manager:
- Can access organization Settings
- Can access organization Billing

testStage.description:
Invite member with Admin role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can change user role from Admin to Manager
    - User after changing role from Admin to Manager:
        - Can access organization Settings
        - Can access organization Billing

retries.statusDetails:
AssertionError: [AssertionError] during step: Pass new user onboarding and create first organization via UI
Message: [AssertionError] during step: Verify Main page is displayed
Message: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: <element(s) not found> 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for locator("a[href^=\"/apps?\"]").filter(has_text="Apps")

Actual value: <element(s) not found>
